---
title: 'Rabbi'
date: '2009-06-17T05:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2510091765347496775'
blogger_filename: '/2009/06/rabbi.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'study'
---

<div align="right" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">6/15/09<o:p></o:p></span></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Rabbi <o:p></o:p></span></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Titles of Servants<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Mathew 23:8-11<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">8</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">But you, do not be called ‘Rabbi’; for One is your Teacher, the Christ,<sup href="&quot;#fen-NKJV-23921b&quot;" title="&quot;See" value="">b]"&gt;[<a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Mathew%2023;&amp;version=50;#fen-NKJV-23921b" title="See footnote b">b</a>]</sup></span></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">and you are all brethren</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">.</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-23922" value="9"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">9</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">Do not call anyone on earth your father; for One is your Father, He who is in heaven.</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-23923" value="10"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">10</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">And do not be called teachers; for One is your Teacher, the Christ.</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-23924" value="11"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">11</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">But he who is greatest among you shall be your servant.</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-23925" value="12"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">12</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">And whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and he who humbles himself will be exalted.</span><o:p></o:p></i></span><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"></i></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">            Over the course of time we allowed the natural governments of this worlds system to enter into Christianity. It started with the Roman catholic church, and goes right through today.  One of the things we are still growing out of is the need for titles in ministry. Titles are important to a degree. By naming a person, place, or thing you establish certain understandings about it. By giving a man a title you begin to understand his place and role within the organization. For far too long we have disobeyed/ignored the scripture in Ephesians 4 <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">11</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">And <b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;">He Himself gave some</b></span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">to be</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">,</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-29279" value="12"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">12</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">for the<b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"> equipping of the saints for the work of ministry</b>, for the edifying of the body of Christ,</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-29280" value="13"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">13</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">till we all come to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to a perfect man, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ;</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-29281" value="14"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">14</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">that we should no longer be children</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">, tossed to and fro and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the trickery of men, in the cunning craftiness of deceitful plotting,</span></i></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-29282" value="15"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">15</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">but, speaking the truth in love, may grow up in all things into Him who is the head—Christ—</span></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><sup id="en-NKJV-29283" value="16"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">16</span></sup></i></b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"> </span></i></span><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">from whom the whole body, joined and knit together by what every joint supplies, according to the effective working by which every part does its share, causes growth of the body for the edifying of itself in love.</span></i></span><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"></i><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">            He did give titles to ministry offices. The scripture is very clear about submitting to the authority spiritually and naturally placed over us. The word says that these five offices were given to the body of Christ to build us up. After the reformation we abandoned the title of “priest” to return to our roots and call the local man of God placed over us “Pastor”. In Recent years we’ve re discovered and come to value the Apostle, Prophet, Evangelist, Pastor AND Teacher as the proper Five Ministry offices placed over the body. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;">            As we’ve done this though, we’ve over corrected in some areas. Do not seek for yourself a title. I’m not walking up to people saying: “Yes, Yes, I’m Reverend Wolfe” Or “Pastor Wolfe” or “Doctor Wolfe”. How about Darrell? Brother Darrell? There must come this balance between respecting the office and seeking a title. Always Honor the office in others, and downplay your own title. Remember that the higher the office you are called to, the greater servant you are called to be. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><span class="apple-style-span"><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"><o:p> </o:p></span></i></span></div><div class="MsoNoSpacing"><strong><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-family: 'Book Antiqua', serif; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="http://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?book_id=52&amp;chapter=12&amp;verse=3&amp;version=50&amp;context=verse">Romans 12:3</a></span></i></strong><i style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt;"><br /><span class="apple-style-span">[</span><span class="apple-converted-space"> </span><span class="apple-style-span">Serve God with Spiritual Gifts</span><span class="apple-converted-space"> </span><span class="apple-style-span">] For I say, through the grace given to me, to everyone who is among you,<b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"> not to think of himself more</b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"> </b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b>highly</b></span><span class="apple-converted-space"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"> </b></span><span class="apple-style-span"><b style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;">than he ought to think, but to think soberly, as God has dealt to each one a measure of faith.</b></span><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p> </o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">            Do not think too lowly or highly. To call yourself less than you are is false. To call yourself higher than you are is false. Get in the word and find out who you are and walk in it. It is right to say:<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am redeemed from the curse.<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am what my bible says I am!<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am an overcomer!<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">But also remember… <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am a son of the King, who serves. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I am a servant of all as I serve Him. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p> </o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">            Remember to keep it real… Knowledge puffs up but love builds up.<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="apple-style-span"><span style="color: black; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">                        In Him, DW</span></span><span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
